<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="Jq38l4PIFtQ7SevU5e-x"> <mxGraphModel dx="1489" dy="1080" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="110" y="1190" width="1270" height="570.91" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="Lab VM — Docker Compose" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;verticalAlign=top;shadow=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="744.72" y="1230" width="585.28" height="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="host" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;verticalAlign=top;shadow=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="170" y="1230" width="430" height="325.52" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Claude Code" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="291.7375" y="1270.812324929972" width="184.87500000000003" height="66.5546218487395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="grafana_mcp_server.py
(FastMCP + httpx)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="193.1375" y="1428.5714285714287" width="382.07500000000005" height="96.1344537815126" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="HTTPS LoadBalancer" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="256.6075" y="1660.0025210084032" width="255.12750000000003" height="66.5546218487395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="Grafana" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffcc99;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="800.0000000000001" y="1290.004117647059" width="144.20250000000001" height="66.5546218487395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="Prometheus" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffcccc;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="948.6225000000001" y="1452.6330532212887" width="177.48000000000002" height="66.5546218487395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="Node Exporter" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1109.9975000000004" y="1290.004117647059" width="200.89750000000004" height="66.5546218487395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="stdio JSON-RPC" style="curved=1;startArrow=block;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" source="5" target="6" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="Bearer token
Grafana HTTP API" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;" edge="1" source="6" target="7" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;" edge="1" source="7" target="8" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" value="datasource proxy /
 scrape targets" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.27;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" source="8" target="9" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="metrics" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.73;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=24;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;labelBackgroundColor=light-dark(#f5f5f5, #ededed);" edge="1" source="10" target="9" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
